compiled_state.title: code-reviewer agents: review_tier field missing from reviewer-findings.json -> record-review.sh WARNING on every review
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
Every record-review.sh invocation in this session (8+ occurrences across 8 commits) printed:
  WARNING: review_tier missing or empty in reviewer-findings.json — cannot verify tier; allowing review (fail-open)

The code-reviewer sub-agents (dso:code-reviewer-standard dispatched as general-purpose with agent file content) write reviewer-findings.json via write-reviewer-findings.sh, but the review_tier field is either not written by write-reviewer-findings.sh or not populated by the reviewing agent.

## Expected Behavior
reviewer-findings.json should include a review_tier field (light/standard/deep) so record-review.sh can verify tier consistency.

## Actual Behavior
review_tier is missing or empty in every reviewer-findings.json, causing a fail-open WARNING. The review is recorded anyway, but tier verification is bypassed.

## Evidence
8 consecutive commits in session worktree-20260412-143336, all showing the same WARNING.
